description: Create and deploy a new channel named 'ADT_Inbound_Validator' that listens on TCP port 6661 for HL7 v2.x messages using MLLP framing. The channel must validate incoming ADT messages: if PID.3 (Patient ID) AND PID.5 (Patient Name) are present, return an ACK with MSA-1='AA' (Application Accept). If either field is missing, return an ACK with MSA-1='AE' (Application Error). Valid messages must be written to a file writer destination at '/home/ga/hl7_outbound/'. The NextGen Connect API is available at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin).
